Name: Liberty State Park
Address: 1 Audrey Zapp Dr, Jersey City, NJ 07305
Description: One of the best places in New Jersey to see the Statue of Liberty and the Manhattan skyline. It's peaceful and perfect for walking along the waterfront.

Name: Liberty Science Center
Address: 222 Jersey City Blvd, Jersey City, NJ 07305
Description: A huge science museum with interactive exhibits and one of the biggest planetariums in the country. It's a fun place to explore and learn.

Name: Princeton University
Description: One of the most beautiful college campuses in the country. Walking around the historic buildings and green spaces is always impressive.

Name: Six Flags Great Adventure
Address: 1 Six Flags Blvd, Jackson Township, NJ 08527
Description: A massive amusement park known for huge roller coasters like Kingda Ka. It's one of the most exciting places to visit in New Jersey.

Name: Point Pleasant Beach
Description: A classic Jersey Shore beach with a boardwalk, rides, and great ocean views. It's a perfect summer destination.

Name: Grounds for Sculpture
Description: A huge outdoor sculpture park filled with art installations and gardens. It's a peaceful place to walk and enjoy creative artwork.

Name: Branch Brook Park
Description: Famous for having more cherry blossom trees than Washington DC. During spring the park is covered in beautiful pink flowers.

Name: American Dream Mall
Address: 1 American Dream Way, East Rutherford, NJ 07073
Description: One of the largest malls in the United States with indoor skiing, water parks, and endless stores.

Name: The Stone Pony
Description: Legendary music venue where famous artists like Bruce Springsteen performed early in their careers.

Name: Asbury Park Boardwalk
Description: A lively boardwalk with food, music, and beach views. It's one of the most iconic spots along the Jersey Shore.
